_purpose: Output of the EXHAUSTIVE community/fan web sweep (Korean Netmarble 'spacewar' service + Japanese Bothtec gin7) for any pre-made CHARACTER roster of 銀河英雄伝説VII online. Companion to content/roster/face-name-map.json (12 official face<->name pairs). See docs/logh7-community-roster-sweep.md for the full method log and every source.
_verdict: NO fan/community-compiled VII-online character roster (with or without face numbers) survives anywhere on the public web, Korean or Japanese. The 2005 rights-dispute shutdown scrubbed all VII-online fan documentation; surviving sources cover only the anime/novel or later/other LOGH games, never the gin7-online chara/NNN numbering. ZERO new name<->face-number pairs beyond the official 12. The one materially useful artifact recovered is the Korean-localized DUTY/POST (직무) hierarchy (below), transcribed from a 2022 ruliweb CBT-tester memoir.
_confidence_note: A fan-compiled list, had one been found, would be tagged 'community' (non-authoritative but useful). None was found, so this file carries process artifacts, not new authoritative data.

community_canon_names_attested.name_ja: ブラウンシュヴァイク
community_canon_names_attested.note: Korean CBT tester recalls Duke von Braunschweig was the dominant unlockable canon admiral ('우주 제일의 명장', solo-beat 3 Alliance fleets). Confirms a門閥貴族-era canon character was playable, consistent with our manual roster. Already a known LOGH character; NO face number attached. Not added to face-name-map (no NNN).

cbt_character_model_confirmation.finding: Korean CBT players first CREATE an original/fictional officer (explicitly likened to 삼국지 신무장 = Romance of the Three Kingdoms custom officer), then UNLOCK canon characters by accumulating 점수/공적 (merit). This independently corroborates our reversed-engineering model where face = an index into a shared portrait POOL (Face/<NNN>.tga) rather than a fixed per-character ID, and the server-authoritative roster assigns faces from that pool.
cbt_character_model_confirmation.impact: Supports memory note logh7-portrait-pool and logh7-character-record-schema: name<->face was never a fixed canon mapping in this game; the developer's st_char.html 12-sample is the only curated name<->NNN data that ever existed.

korean_duty_post_localization._purpose: Korean (cp949-target) translation of the gin7 duty-card / post hierarchy (직무), transcribed from the 2022 ruliweb CBT memoir screenshots (i2/i3.ruliweb.com/img/22/10/05/183a443f*..183a4440*.jpg). This is the MOST USEFUL artifact of the sweep: it gives the authoritative Korean post names matching content/roster/manual-roster.json postDefinitions (121 posts), directly reusable for the cp949 String.txt localization layer. These are POST/TITLE names, NOT character names.
korean_duty_post_localization._caveat: Hand-transcribed from low-res 2022 screenshots; verify spacing/spelling against client String.txt before shipping. Faction headers shown bilingually in-client: 은하제국 (銀河帝国) / 자유행성동맹 (自由惑星同盟).

fleet_unit_structure_kr.note: Matches our reversed in-world multiplayer model (logh7-inworld-multiplayer-protocol): fleet = up to 10 player characters with commander/vice/staff roles.
